plugins.name: sophia-motor
plugins.description: Claude Code skill for the sophia-motor Python library — teaches your local Claude how to build production agents with @tool decorator, MotorConfig, RunTask, subagents, in-process MCP, structured output, multi-turn chat.

plugins.name: python-next-project
plugins.description: Claude Code skill that guides scaffolding of production-grade, Docker-containerized applications with a Python backend and a Next.js frontend — project layout, Dockerfiles, compose, and the gold-standard conventions to get right from day one.
